description: Tiny eval set for the books domain transfer test (action #7).

ground_truth_top5.reason: Designing Data-Intensive Applications — the canonical answer.
Crafting Interpreters touches systems-y topics but isn't distributed.
TAOCP is foundational depth but not distributed.
You Don't Know JS Yet — exact match.

queries.query_text: practical book about writing better code, accessible to junior developers

ground_truth_top5.reason: Pragmatic Programmer — high practicality, low difficulty.
Refactoring — practical but harder than the top two.

queries.query_text: rigorous algorithms reference, not afraid of math

ground_truth_top5.reason: TAOCP — rigorous, mathematically dense, the canonical answer.

queries.query_text: a book that reads like a novel about how computers work

ground_truth_top5.reason: Code: The Hidden Language — narrative-driven CS fundamentals.
